## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintenance outcome and why it belongs in the local-only extension.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the smallest relevant tests while developing.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm validate` after the final change.
- [ ] I updated documentation, permissions, privacy text, or the changelog when applicable.
- [ ] I used only synthetic or explicitly redistributable test material.

## Security and license

- [ ] This change adds no hosted API, upload flow, telemetry, remote executable code, or secret.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under AGPL-3.0-only.
- [ ] I understand this contribution is not licensed for proprietary reuse without separate permission.
